Video.summary: Dick Cavett chats about his commencement speech at Yale (a lot of potty jokes and one-liners, apparently)
Video.title: Talk Show Greats - Dick Cavett (6/12/84)

Image.alt: Talk Show Greats - Dick Cavett (6/12/84)
Talk Show Greats - Dick Cavett (6/12/84)
Talk Show Greats - Dick Cavett (6/12/84)

Video.summary: Dean Martin sips on "apple juice" and Johnny samples it. Martin Mull plays a song in French.
Video.title: The Very Best of Johnny and Guests - Dean Martin, Martin Mull (8/9/78)

Image.alt: The Very Best of Johnny and Guests - Dean Martin, Martin Mull (8/9/78)
The Very Best of Johnny and Guests - Dean Martin, Martin Mull (8/9/78)
The Very Best of Johnny and Guests - Dean Martin, Martin Mull (8/9/78)

Video.summary: A 12-year-old Fred Savage "Kind-Of-Sorta" has a girlfriend, plus future host Jay Leno stops by.
Video.title: Hollywood Icons Of The '80s - Fred Savage (2/2/89)

Image.alt: Hollywood Icons Of The '80s - Fred Savage (2/2/89)
Hollywood Icons Of The '80s - Fred Savage (2/2/89)
Hollywood Icons Of The '80s - Fred Savage (2/2/89)

Video.summary: Jokes are the theme on this show, with Martin Short, Terri Garr and Michael Keaton. Lotsa fun!
Video.title: Hollywood Icons Of The '80s - Michael Keaton (5/14/92)

Image.alt: Hollywood Icons Of The '80s - Michael Keaton (5/14/92)
Hollywood Icons Of The '80s - Michael Keaton (5/14/92)
Hollywood Icons Of The '80s - Michael Keaton (5/14/92)

Video.summary: Danny DeVito has to cut off his ponytail for a role and Richard Benjamin stops by.
Video.title: Hollywood Icons Of The '80s - Danny DeVito (12/9/88)

Image.alt: Hollywood Icons Of The '80s - Danny DeVito (12/9/88)
Hollywood Icons Of The '80s - Danny DeVito (12/9/88)
Hollywood Icons Of The '80s - Danny DeVito (12/9/88)

Video.summary: Robin Williams has a raucous interview. Jonathan Winters worries about his pets falling down in an earthquake.
Video.title: The Very Best of Johnny and Guests - Robin Williams, Jonathan Winters (9/19/91)

Image.alt: The Very Best of Johnny and Guests - Robin Williams, Jonathan Winters (9/19/91)
The Very Best of Johnny and Guests - Robin Williams, Jonathan Winters (9/19/91)

Video.summary: In his first appearance on the show, Jim Carrey impersonates Elvis, Jack Nicholson, E. T. and the Muppets.
Video.title: Comic Legends Of The '90s - Jim Carrey (11/24/83)

Image.alt: Comic Legends Of The '90s - Jim Carrey (11/24/83)
Comic Legends Of The '90s - Jim Carrey (11/24/83)
Comic Legends Of The '90s - Jim Carrey (11/24/83)

Video.summary: Tony Randall joins the panel panel and he's joined by Lara Flynn Boyle, who discusses "Twin Peaks."
Video.title: Hollywood Icons Of The '90s - Lara Flynn Boyle (5/9/90)

Image.alt: Hollywood Icons Of The '90s - Lara Flynn Boyle (5/9/90)
Hollywood Icons Of The '90s - Lara Flynn Boyle (5/9/90)

Video.summary: Adrienne Barbeau has gotten some strange X-mas presents! Plus, Johnny interviews Richard Harris and Bob Hope.
Video.title: Hollywood Icons Of The '80s - Adrienne Barbeau (12/12/74)

Image.alt: Hollywood Icons Of The '80s - Adrienne Barbeau (12/12/74)

Video.summary: Albert Brooks talks puppy love, Susan Sarandon talks clam shucking and Carnac the Magnificent works his magic.
Video.title: Hollywood Icons Of The '80s - Albert Brooks (4/9/81)

Image.alt: Hollywood Icons Of The '80s - Albert Brooks (4/9/81)

Video.summary: Carlin does stand up and gets sentimental about his 13th wedding anniversary.
Video.title: The Best Of George Carlin (6/3/74)

Image.alt: The Best Of George Carlin (6/3/74)
The Best Of George Carlin (6/3/74)

Video.summary: Animal wrangler Joan Embery brings a rare Canadian Lynx to the show, and actor Ron Silver also visits.
Video.title: Animal Antics With Joan Embery (1/18/90)

Image.alt: Animal Antics With Joan Embery (1/18/90)
Animal Antics With Joan Embery (1/18/90)

Video.summary: What's Joan Embery brought for Johnny this time? A Gila Monster and an anteater, for starters.

Animal Antics With Joan Embery (5/28/80)

Video.summary: James talks series, “Man Of The People,” biggest career clinkers, TV Hall Of Fame, and public speaking fear.

Video.summary: Johnny talks about a trip to the butcher. Martin Mull sings and plays guitar.

Video.summary: Brooke Shields discusses Sahara, Albert Brooks goes on a mild tirade and Johnny jokes about President Reagan.

Video.summary: Dana Carvey stops by and does impressions. Plus, Christopher Reeve talks Superman and Frank Olivier juggles.

Video.summary: Vodka and Russia are twin themes on this fun episode with Yakov Smirnoff and Dabney Coleman.

Video.summary: Jerry Seinfeld skewers Rambo flicks. Arnold Schwarzenegger plays a Russian cop and learns the language!

Video.summary: Candice Bergen chats about her marriage and how rude the French are. Comic actor Tim Reid also guests.
